fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the rounding method for item prices.

fields.name: Minimum Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum amount to round.

fields.name: Amount Added Before
fields.tooltip: Specifies an amount to add before it is rounded.

fields.name: Precision
fields.tooltip: Specifies the size of the interval that you want between rounded amounts.

fields.name: Amount Added After
fields.tooltip: Specifies an amount to add, after the amount has been rounded.
